/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/tests/test_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/lexer/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/lexer/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/lexer/TokenType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/parser/AST.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_parser.dir/src/utils/Error.cpp.o -o test_parser
